problem id: 33c48893
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  00100111 -> 10010011
  00110111 -> 10011011
  00101111 -> 10010111
  10001010 -> 01000101
  01001001 -> 10100100
  11100100 -> 01110010
  00100000 -> 00010000
  00100110 -> 00010011
  01011001 -> 10101100
  11111001 -> 11111100

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 01100101
